name: Chile Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Bisquick pancake mix according to package instructions.
2. Place the shredded mozzarella cheese in each of the hollowed-out green chiles.
3. Dip each chile into the prepared pancake batter, ensuring they are well-coated.
4. Fry the stuffed chiles until golden brown. Turn them once if possible, being careful not to overcook or burn them.
